raw_consumer_statement: Someone stole my credit card information and made purchases on XXXX through her XXXX account. I called XXXX and I found out that the person who used my information without my authorization was my ex girlfriend where we broke up 2 years ago. I haven't seen her since then and I've never gave her my credit cards or authorized her to use my cards. I already filed a police report and an FBI report against her. Also I have an appointment with a lawyer next week. I contacted CITI to dispute the charges and they sent me a letter where it says that I knowingly provided access to my financial information, including credit cards and bank accounts which implies the authority to act on my behalf. They're asking me to pay otherwise they'll report my account.
